ValidationRule.description: this is used to ensure that the Lead is owned by a service user and not a single named user.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: $Permission.BD_Bypass_Automation != TRUE && NOT(CONTAINS("PerkinElmer Inc.,Eloqua Service Account", Owner:User.fxUserFullName__c)) && NOT(CONTAINS("Data Migration", Owner:User.fxUserFullName__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_LEAD_015: Leads should be owned by the service user called "PerkinElmer Inc." (not a named user, since users own interactions instead)
